_doc: Add new lineups by appending rows to the `lineups` array below.
Then run: `node scripts/apply-additions.mjs`
It will be merged into the corresponding data/<map>.js file.
REQUIRED fields per lineup:
id            unique snake_case identifier
map           one of: ancient, anubis, cache, dust2, inferno, mirage, nuke, overpass
name          human-readable lineup name
util          one of: SMOKE, FLASH, MOLLY, HE
side          T or CT
area          callout the smoke/util LANDS in (Mid, A, B, Banana, etc.)
throwPos      EXACT in-game setpos as [x, y[, z?]] from `setpos x y z`
OR { source: 'percent', x, y } if you only have a percent
landingPos    Same shape — where the utility ACTUALLY lands
Use the in-game getpos value standing AT the smoke center if possible
OR { source: 'percent', x, y } from cs2util-style 2D map
throw         throw style: LMB | JT | WJT | RMB | RUN | WALK2
source        { name, url }  — required so we know where the data came from
OPTIONAL fields:
purpose, stand, aim, notes, video, screenshots {stand, aim, result}, mustLearn
No throwPos/landingPos = the script will REFUSE to add the lineup.
Don't invent coordinates.
